groups.description: 双方在某区域的空中占位能力对比

queries.label: 红蓝双方占位能力对比
queries.sql: SELECT side, capability_score, aircraft_count, patrol_coverage FROM air_capability WHERE region = '{region}' AND capability_type = 'occupation'

groups.description: 双方在某区域的空中打击能力对比

queries.label: 红蓝双方打击能力对比
queries.sql: SELECT side, capability_score, weapon_count, strike_range FROM air_capability WHERE region = '{region}' AND capability_type = 'strike'

groups.description: 双方在某区域的空中侦察能力对比

queries.label: 红蓝双方侦察能力对比
queries.sql: SELECT side, capability_score, recon_range, detection_accuracy FROM air_capability WHERE region = '{region}' AND capability_type = 'recon'

groups.description: 双方在某区域的总体制空能力综合对比

queries.label: 红蓝双方总体制空能力对比
queries.sql: SELECT side, total_score, occupation_score, strike_score, recon_score FROM air_overall WHERE region = '{region}'
